## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Otto and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, progress, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pipeline ramping up to 5 new posts/week; 3 posts ready for review/publishing](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Image style update requested: more colorful, varied palette beyond blue/white](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Identified potential content gaps and new topic ideas (e.g., Otto's unique booking capabilities)](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Blog launch planned once 3 complete posts are ready for homepage layout](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [2 posts sent for feedback via Google Doc (link access issues to be resolved)](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [1 post approved and ready to publish](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Ramping up to 5 new posts/week starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [8-10 approved topics in the pipeline; more approvals needed to prevent future bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### Image Style Refinement

  - [Current images use blue/white palette matching brand colors](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Jason requested more colorful, varied images for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [No strict brand color limitations for blog images](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [GrowthX to update image pipeline for more vibrant, diverse visuals](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

### Content Gap Analysis

  - [Discussed highlighting Otto's unique capabilities (e.g., booking flights and hotels simultaneously)](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)
  - [Explored keyword ideas: "how to book multi-city flights and hotels" (difficulty 0-50)](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Considered topics like "is it cheaper to book flight and hotel together?" tailored for business travelers](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Proposed focusing on general business travel challenges and how Otto addresses them](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Blog Launch Timeline

  - [Jason plans to launch when 3 complete posts are ready](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Homepage layout supports 3-column design](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Full blog page with entry points to individual posts to be implemented at launch](https://fathom.video/share/EdnKkLaQp-M-o7tSv69e94yU6byEk9xa?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
